This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Boyce D. McDaniel papers
McDaniel, Boyce D. (Boyce Dawkins), 1917-2002
14-22-3242
12.1 cubic feet. 12.1 cubic feet.
1933-2002. Correspondence, photographs, videotapes, technical drawings, academic papers, books, certificates Personal and Professional papers and correspondence relating to his work at Newman Laboratory and in the Physics Department, especially files relating to the Cornell Electron Storage Ring (CESR) and the Superconducting Supercollider (SSC). Also includes information about Robert Wilson and his memorial service. Collection material in English 4480231
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Julia Parker
Date completed:
August 2003
EAD encoding:
Julia Parker, August 2003Peter Martinez, September 2003Sharon Jank 2006
Date modified:
RMC Staff, December 2017
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2018
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Physicist.
Professional papers and correspondence relating to his work at Newman Laboratory and in the Physics Department, especially files relating to the Cornell Electron Storage Ring (CESR) and the Superconducting Supercollider (SSC). Also includes information about Robert Wilson and his memorial service.
Personal papers, including diplomas and certificated; photographs; files about his retirement celebration; obituaries and memorial statements; and clippings.
SERIES LIST
Series I. Biography
Box 1, 8, 17-18
Series II. Correspondence
Box 1
Series III. Cornell University
Boxes 1-3
Series IV. Non-Cornell
Boxes 3-4
Series V. Proposals
Boxes 1-4
Series VI. Publications
Boxes 4-5
Series VII. Conferences/Talks/Reports
Box 5
Series VIII. Honors
Boxes 6, 8-10
Series IX. Plans/Drawings/Charts
Boxes 8, Mapcase
Series X. Photographs
Boxes 5-6,10
Series XI. Videotapes
Box 7
Series XII. Transparencies
Box 5
Series XIII. Miscellaneous Materials
Boxes 5, 11
Series XIV. Restricted Materials
Boxes 12-14
Series XV. Binder Materials
Boxes 15-16
Cite As:
Boyce D. McDaniel papers, #14-22-3242. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Access Restrictions:
Access to Boxes 12-14 restricted to the permission of the University Archivist.
Neutrons. Particle acceleration. Electrons -- Capture. Nuclear physics. Superconducting Super Collider. Physicists. Wilson, Robert R., 1914-2000. Cornell University. Department of Physics Cornell University -- : Faculty.
